_comment: Curated CAPN3 evidence bundles for Milestone 1. Case 1 is grounded in a real ClinVar entry (coordinates not independently verified — see notes). Cases 2 and 3 are synthetic, constructed specifically to exercise the Pathogenic and Likely Benign combining-rule paths with the Milestone-1 criterion set (PVS1, PM2, PP3, BP4, BA1, BS1). Expected results for all three live separately in validation/golden_cases/capn3_milestone1.yaml.

gene_disease_context.disease: Limb-girdle muscular dystrophy, type R1 calpain3-related (LGMDR1 / calpainopathy)

cases.notes: Real ClinVar entry (Variation ID 17621), reported Pathogenic. Known founder mutation, reported to account for up to ~75% of abnormal CAPN3 alleles in some European (esp. Northern Spanish / Basque and other Southern/Western European) populations — this is why ancestry_specific_max_af is meaningfully higher than overall_af rather than roughly equal. PM2 (absent/extremely low frequency) is written up here as MET in the golden case using the low overall AF (0.023%), but a curator reviewing this case should not treat that as settled: PM2 is defined around population rarity, and a founder allele that is locally common in the tested individual's ancestry group is a weaker fit for 'extremely low frequency' than the global AF alone suggests. This is exactly the ancestry-stratification nuance the ACMG Engine Detailed Design Guide flags for PM2 (Section 7, 'Population frequency thresholds'); a real evaluator should key its threshold check off ancestry_specific_max_af, not overall_af, once ancestry is known. Flagged for manual review in the golden case rather than silently trusted. Exact GRCh38 coordinates were not independently verified during curation (see variant.coordinate_verified=false); HGVS (c.550del) and the ClinVar accession are used as the authoritative identifiers instead.

gene_disease_context.disease: Limb-girdle muscular dystrophy, type R1 calpain3-related (LGMDR1 / calpainopathy)

computational_evidence.calibration_source: synthetic fixture, calibrated thresholds per Pejaver et al. 2022 style bins

cases.notes: Fully synthetic — constructed to exercise the Pathogenic combining-rule path (1 Very Strong + 1 Moderate + 1 Supporting) with the Milestone-1 criterion set: PVS1 (nonsense, NMD-predicted, well upstream of the last exon), PM2 (absent from a well-covered gnomAD locus), PP3 (calibrated computational prediction, pathogenic-supporting). Not a real ClinVar variant; do not treat coordinates, HGVS, or allele counts as biologically real.

gene_disease_context.disease: Limb-girdle muscular dystrophy, type R1 calpain3-related (LGMDR1 / calpainopathy)

computational_evidence.calibration_source: synthetic fixture, calibrated thresholds per Pejaver et al. 2022 style bins

cases.notes: Fully synthetic — constructed to exercise the Likely Benign combining-rule path (1 Strong-Benign + 1 Supporting-Benign) with the Milestone-1 criterion set: BS1 (allele frequency higher than expected for the disorder's prevalence, well above a plausible AR-disease threshold, with observed homozygotes) and BP4 (calibrated computational prediction, benign-supporting). Deliberately not BA1-level frequency, so this case exercises the BS1+BP4 path rather than the stand-alone BA1 path. Not a real ClinVar variant.
